name: Get latest Fear & Greed Index
prompt: 目前加密貨幣市場的恐懼貪婪指數是多少？
notes: Should display value (0-100), classification, and Chinese translation

name: Get Fear & Greed Index history
prompt: 顯示過去 30 天的恐懼貪婪指數趨勢
notes: Should show trend table with dates and daily values

name: Get global market overview (BitoPro-relevant fields only)
prompt: 加密貨幣全球市場概況如何？
notes: Should display total market cap, BTC/ETH dominance, 24h volume. MUST NOT display active_cryptocurrencies, markets, or ICO counts (global universe stats unrelated to BitoPro).

name: Get BitoPro coin rankings
prompt: BitoPro 上架幣種的市值排行？
notes: Must only show BitoPro-listed coins (MV removed post-delisting). BITO may have null market_cap_rank — display as —.

name: Trending coins — BitoPro filter (drop non-BitoPro)
prompt: 現在有什麼熱門幣種？有在 BitoPro 上架嗎？
notes: MUST drop all non-BitoPro trending coins. If BitoPro coin set doesn't intersect with trending, show '本輪全球趨勢榜無 BitoPro 上架幣種' message. Never list non-BitoPro coin names.

name: Category performance must be rejected (out of scope)
prompt: 哪些加密貨幣板塊今天漲最多？
notes: Tool 5 (category performance) removed in v1.1. Categories don't map cleanly to BitoPro's 18 coins. Skill should explain this is out of scope.

name: Get company BTC holdings
prompt: 哪些上市公司持有最多比特幣？
notes: Should show top companies by BTC holdings

name: Get company ETH holdings
prompt: 上市公司 ETH 持倉排行
notes: Should show top companies by ETH holdings

name: Get BTC multi-timeframe details
prompt: 比特幣的詳細行情，各時間維度漲跌幅
notes: Should show price changes across all timeframes and ATH data

name: Get SOL details
notes: Should correctly map SOL to CoinPaprika ID sol-solana

name: Comprehensive market overview
prompt: 給我一份完整的加密貨幣市場概覽
notes: Should combine multiple tools for comprehensive report. Tools should be called in parallel.

name: Reject non-BitoPro coin query
notes: Should inform user that PEPE is not listed on BitoPro and not fetch data for it

name: BitoPro top gainers
prompt: BitoPro 上今天漲最多的幣是哪些？
notes: Should sort by price_change_percentage_24h descending and highlight top gainers

name: Refresh BitoPro trading pair list
prompt: BitoPro 現在有哪些幣種可以交易？
notes: Must (a) use `Accept: application/json` header, (b) output full per-pair specs, (c) group by TWD/USDT/BTC quote, (d) use 億/萬 notation — NEVER scientific notation like 1e+08.
